---
title: "The Rev. James Stevenson"
---

## The Rev. James Stevenson

### Description

missionary with the China Inland Mission

### Biography

Not identified.  Possibly a mistake for the Rev. John Whiteford Stevenson (1844-1918)?

### Letters

- Letter from Edinburgh, 1st.July 1893

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
